name: collection_page_5_collections_teas

observed_strengths.observation: Collection has a descriptive intro ('Exceptional Aroma. Exceptional Tea.') reinforcing the 100% organic, ethically sourced positioning at the top of the grid
Product grid spans the core catalog (Sencha Green, Heartburn, Sampler, Sleep, Black Tea), giving a complete browse path from one page

missing_or_weak.observation: No sort/filter controls (by benefit, caffeine, price) visible, making it harder for shoppers to narrow within the tea range
No per-card ratings or 'best seller' badges on the grid to guide selection via social proof

purchase_path_notes: Collection is a straightforward grid → PDP path; lacks filtering and proof cues that would speed selection within a multi-SKU range.
